violations.text: Establishment is lacking an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2024
The restroom is lacking a hand-washing sign. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the reach-in refrigerator. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024

Ice scoop handle was in direct contact with ice. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the flat top (underneath) have an accumulation of grease, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024

The floors in the following areas have an accumulation of rodent droppings. 1. Dry ingredient storage 2. Equipment storage The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2024
